project_type: Full-stack AI video generation app - FastAPI backend + React/Vite/TypeScript frontend
build_system: pip with pyproject.toml (backend), npm with vite (frontend)
test_framework: pytest with asyncio (backend), vitest with testing-library (frontend)
test_command: cd /projects/sandbox/abetVideos/frontend && npm run test; cd /projects/sandbox/abetVideos/backend && python -m pytest tests/ -x 2>/dev/null || true
verification_instructions: 1. Install backend deps: pip install -e . in backend/ 2. Install frontend deps: npm install in frontend/ 3. Run frontend build: npm run build 4. Run frontend tests: npm run test 5. Run backend tests: pytest tests/
setup_instructions: cd backend && pip install -e '.[dev]' && cd ../frontend && npm install
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Python 3.11, Node.js 22 available.
contribution_requirements: No specific CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing patterns in the codebase.
key_patterns: Backend: FastAPI routers in backend/app/routers/, services in backend/app/services/, Pydantic models in backend/app/models/schemas.py, config in backend/app/config.py. MediaProvider ABC with registry pattern (register in media_sourcer.py). Frontend: React Router in App.tsx, Layout with nav in components/Layout.tsx, API client in api/client.ts, types in types/index.ts, pages in pages/, hooks in hooks/.
directory_structure: backend/app/routers/ - API route handlers; backend/app/services/ - business logic (video_assembler, media_sourcer, etc.); backend/app/models/ - Pydantic schemas; frontend/src/pages/ - page components; frontend/src/components/ - reusable UI; frontend/src/api/ - API client; frontend/src/hooks/ - custom hooks; frontend/src/types/ - TypeScript interfaces
